title: Esau's Ridge
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Esau's Ridge''' was a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler's]] hideout on [[Tholatin]], located in a crevasse between rock walls. In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] its security chief was [[Plaan]]. Its earlier supervisors included [[Bracha e'Naso]] and [[Formayj]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
